reason: The fused-output mapper path is valid, but the evaluated result did not beat the accepted dedicated-softmax baseline and the nm2 ranking is still confounded by heuristic row-splitting behavior.
next_action: Promote docs/development_items/items/item_l2_mapper_memory_aware_split_v1.md into a bounded mapper proposal that compares monolithic and split multi-module lowering on the same softmaxcmp hardware.
